name: @kengela/connector-translog
description: Kengela — connecteur TransLog Pro : implemente CredentialStore, AuthorizationRepository, SessionStore et PolicyStore contre le schema Prisma reel de TransLog. Paquet prive de reference.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-dist-markers.mjs dist
